channel.title: Entertainment
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Entertainment, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Ex-Prince Andrew Insisted Princess Eugenie Deserved a Grand Royal Wedding After Prince Harry's (Exclusive)
item.description: "She’s a granddaughter of the Queen — a princess of the blood," Andrew Lownie tells PEOPLE in this week's cover story. "He believed she should get eve...

item.title: A Look at Ryan Gosling and Eva Mendes' Rare Photos Together Through the Years
item.description: The couple who have been together since 2011, recently made their first public appearance together on the 'Tonight Show with Jimmy Fallon'

item.title: Charles Leclerc’s Wife Alexandra Saint Mleux Explains Why She Did Her Own Wedding Makeup
item.description: The couple married in Monaco on Feb. 28 after a three month engagement

item.title: Former“ Below Deck” Star Emile Kotze Sues NBCUniversal for $850 Million Over Alleged Sexual Harassment
item.description: The 'Below Deck' season 3 castmate claimed in his initial complaint he was “sexually harassed, manipulated, and subjected to degrading treatment" on t...

item.title: Who Is Dree Hemingway, Whose “Love Story” Portrayal of Daryl Hannah Was Blasted as 'Untrue' by the Actress?
item.description: Hemingway previously called playing Hannah in the FX series "an incredible and iconic shoe to fill"

item.title: Sherrone Moore Strikes Deal, Pleads No Contest to Two Misdemeanors
item.description: Disgraced former Michigan football coach Sherrone Moore just caught a huge break in his case -- he struck a deal with prosecutors to plead no contest ...

item.title: 'Pulp Fiction's The Gimp, Stephen Hibbert, Dead at 68
item.description: Writer and actor Stephen Hibbert -- whose best-known role was The Gimp in 1994's "Pulp Fiction" -- has died, TMZ has learned. A family member tells TM...

item.title: Sexy Legs Guess Who!
item.description: Slide into the weekend with a fun game of Guess Who! Can you score which Hollywood hottie put her sexy stems on display in these eye-popping shots?! S...

item.title: Ben Stiller's 'Born to Bowl' Star Cameron Crowe Arrested on Drug Charges
item.description: Professional bowler Cameron "Cam" Crowe -- who is featured in Ben Stiller's upcoming HBO documentary "Born to Bowl" -- has been arrested on drug-relat...

item.title: Influencer Ash Trevino Arrested for Violating Bond, New Conditions Imposed
item.description: Influencer Ash Trevino ended up back in jail for allegedly violating her bond conditions ... TMZ has learned. According to court documents, prosecutor...
